text: This chapter shall not apply with respect to any crash, or judgment arising therefrom, or violation of the motor vehicle laws of this State occurring prior to September 1, 1949.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.400 — Chapter not retroactive.

This chapter shall not apply with respect to any crash, or judgment arising therefrom, or violation of the motor vehicle laws of this State occurring prior to September 1, 1949.

subsections.text: This chapter shall not apply with respect to any crash, or judgment arising therefrom, or violation of the motor vehicle laws of this State occurring prior to September 1, 1949.
